subcodes.first_line: O thou who art renowned throughout the world for thy passionate devotion! Praise be to God that in the pathway of divine love thou hast set thy home ablaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بر همه عالم مشهور بشیدائی الحمد لله درسبیل محبت الله در خانه بسوختن
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @firmness in the Covenant
